name: NDA Excuse to Move Off-Platform
description: Scammer uses a fake NDA requirement to redirect freelancer to communicate via personal email

conversation.speaker: scammer
conversation.message: This is an NDA project and cannot be discussed on platform. Please contact me at private.contracts@gmail.com.

conversation.speaker: target
conversation.message: Why can't we discuss here? Fiverr messages are confidential.

conversation.speaker: scammer
conversation.message: I will only share project details off-platform. The budget is $8,000 for 2 weeks. Contact me there first.

red_flags: Personal Gmail instead of business email
High budget bait to motivate compliance
